𝗟𝗘𝗠𝗨𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗 | Emulating classic video game consoles on Android devices.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Emulating classic video game consoles on Android devices.
📅 Created: Dec 2019 • Updated: Apr 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Libretro integration
✅ Wide system support (Atari, Nintendo, Sega, PlayStation, PSP, NDS, 3DS, Arcade, etc.)
✅ Ease of use and good Android integration
✅ Automatic save/restore game states
✅ ROM scanning and indexing
✅ Optimized touch controls
✅ Gamepad support
✅ Android TV support
✅ Cloud save sync


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 270 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 525 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Lemuroid is an open-source Android emulator based on Libretro, designed for ease of use and a great user experience. It supports a wide range of classic gaming consoles and offers features like automatic state saving, ROM scanning, and customizable touch controls.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Swordfish90/Lemuroid

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗨𝗡𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗖𝗢𝗥𝗗 | Bulk deletion of messages in Discord channels or direct messages via a browser extension.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Bulk deletion of messages in Discord channels or direct messages via a browser extension.
📅 Created: Aug 2019 • Updated: Apr 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Bulk delete all messages in a Discord channel or DM
✅ Operates as a browser extension/userscript
✅ Easy and fast message deletion
✅ Requires browser-based Discord access (not the desktop app)


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

🍴 774 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 79 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Undiscord is a browser extension and userscript designed to efficiently delete all messages within a Discord channel or direct message. It operates directly within the browser, offering a fast and easy way to manage message history.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗-𝗦𝗠𝗦-𝗚𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗪𝗔𝗬 | Enabling programmatic sending and receiving of SMS messages through an API, integrating SMS functionality into other applications and services.  📈 Growing!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling programmatic sending and receiving of SMS messages through an API, integrating SMS functionality into other applications and services.
📅 Created: Jun 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Send and Receive SMS via API
✅ Support for Android 5.0 and above
✅ Multipart message support
✅ Message status tracking
✅ Incoming messages viewer
✅ Real-time incoming message notifications via webhooks
✅ MMS download notifications
✅ Local and Cloud Server modes


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 599 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The Android SMS Gateway app transforms an Android device into an SMS gateway, allowing users to send and receive SMS messages programmatically via an API. It supports direct device access or cloud server integration, making it suitable for embedding SMS functionality into other applications.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗜𝗖𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗞 | To provide a private, autonomous AI assistant that can perform web browsing, coding, and task management locally on a user's machine, without relying on cloud services.  🌟 Rising Fast!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a private, autonomous AI assistant that can perform web browsing, coding, and task management locally on a user's machine, without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fully Local & Private operation
✅ Smart Web Browsing capabilities
✅ Autonomous Coding Assistant for multiple languages
✅ Automatic Agent Selection for tasks
✅ Complex Task Planning and Execution
✅ Voice-Enabled interaction (in progress)


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 25.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.9K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 29 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AgenticSeek is a fully local, voice-enabled AI assistant that autonomously browses the web, writes code, and plans complex tasks. It functions entirely on the user's hardware, ensuring complete privacy and eliminating cloud dependency, making it a private alternative to services like Manus AI.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗘𝗗𝗜𝗧𝗢𝗥 | Creating and sharing 3D architectural projects.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating and sharing 3D architectural projects.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 3D architectural project creation and sharing
✅ Built with React Three Fiber and WebGPU
✅ Turborepo monorepo architecture
✅ Separation of concerns into core, viewer, and editor packages
✅ Zustand stores for scene, viewer, and editor state management
✅ Node-based scene description with parent-child hierarchy
✅ Persistence to IndexedDB with undo/redo functionality


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 9.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pascal Editor is a 3D architectural building editor built using React Three Fiber and WebGPU, leveraging a monorepo architecture with Turborepo. It separates concerns into core schema and state management, 3D rendering components, and the main editor application, enabling the creation and sharing of architectural projects.

𝗠𝗘𝗗𝗚𝗘𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗪 | To provide a conversational AI interface for executing complex biomedical research analyses, making advanced bioinformatics and drug discovery workflows accessible through natural language interaction.  🔍 Worth a Look

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 TeX 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a conversational AI interface for executing complex biomedical research analyses, making advanced bioinformatics and drug discovery workflows accessible through natural language interaction.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered biomedical research assistant
✅ Supports RNA-seq, drug discovery, clinical analysis, and more
✅ Integrates 140 K-Dense Scientific Skills
✅ Real-time research dashboard
✅ RStudio and JupyterLab integration
✅ Conversational interface via WhatsApp, Slack, Discord
✅ Open-source and built on OpenClaw and Claude Code


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 950 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 320 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MedgeClaw is an open-source AI research assistant designed for biomedical applications. It allows users to interact via messaging apps like WhatsApp or Slack to initiate complex analyses such as RNA-seq, drug discovery, and clinical research, with results accessible through RStudio or JupyterLab.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂
